title: state spread + no-self
manager: State spread — `...&group` pulling a group's members into a declaration — with a no-self rule preventing a state from spreading into itself. Spread is the composition tool that lets declarations share structure (the same set of transitions applied across a group), and the no-self guard is what keeps spread from creating a paradoxical self-inclusion that would loop the expansion.
cs: state spread `...` with a no-self rule (fsl#453/#72/#142); shares structure across group members; the spread half of the groups cluster (W6.81).
